docket_entries.description: ORDER RELEASING LIEN [NO S.A.S.E. - COPY OF ORDER IN DEPT. 501 OUTBOX]

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501,PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF RUBY HERNANDEZ'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN IS GRANTED. 90 DAYS HAVE ELAPSED, MAKING THE LIEN UNENFORCEABLE AND DISMISSAL PROPER. Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF RUBY HERNANDEZ's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. 90 days have elapsed, making the lien unenforceable and dismissal proper. See CCP 8460 et seq. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
